mapper.insert: INSERT INTO demand ( title, description, type, priority, status, project_id, module_id, iteration_id, parent_id, creator_id, assignee_id, reviewer_id, approver_id, estimated_hours, actual_hours, story_points, expected_start_date, expected_end_date, actual_start_date, actual_end_date, approve_time, start_develop_time, start_test_time, complete_time, approve_comment, reject_reason, acceptance_criteria, acceptance_result, version, source, business_value, technical_solution, risk_description, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{description}, #{type}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{projectId}, #{moduleId}, #{iterationId}, #{parentId}, #{creatorId}, #{assigneeId}, #{reviewerId}, #{approverId}, #{estimatedHours}, #{actualHours}, #{storyPoints}, #{expectedStartDate}, #{expectedEndDate}, #{actualStartDate}, #{actualEndDate}, #{approveTime}, #{startDevelopTime}, #{startTestTime}, #{completeTime}, #{approveComment}, #{rejectReason}, #{acceptanceCriteria}, #{acceptanceResult}, #{version}, #{source}, #{businessValue}, #{technicalSolution}, #{riskDescription}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, p.real_name AS creatorName, a.real_name AS assigneeName, r.real_name AS reviewerName, ap.real_name AS approverName FROM demand d LEFT JOIN sys_user p ON d.creator_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user a ON d.assignee_id = a.id LEFT JOIN sys_user r ON d.reviewer_id = r.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ap ON d.approver_id = ap.id WHERE d.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM demand WHERE delete_time IS NULL ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM demand WHERE delete_time IS NULL GROUP BY status
SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM demand WHERE delete_time IS NULL GROUP BY type
SELECT priority, COUNT(*) as count FROM demand WHERE delete_time IS NULL GROUP BY priority
SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM demand WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND delete_time IS NULL GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT d.*, p.real_name AS creatorName FROM demand d LEFT JOIN sys_user p ON d.creator_id = p.id WHERE d.status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' AND d.create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{hours} HOUR) AND d.delete_time IS NULL ORDER BY d.create_time ASC

SELECT d.*, p.real_name AS creatorName, a.real_name AS assigneeName, r.real_name AS reviewerName, ap.real_name AS approverName, pr.name AS projectName, m.name AS moduleName, i.name AS iterationName FROM demand d LEFT JOIN sys_user p ON d.creator_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user a ON d.assignee_id = a.id LEFT JOIN sys_user r ON d.reviewer_id = r.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ap ON d.approver_id = ap.id LEFT JOIN sys_project pr ON d.project_id = pr.id LEFT JOIN project_module m ON d.module_id = m.id LEFT JOIN sys_iteration i ON d.iteration_id = i.id WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.delete_time IS NULL

SELECT d.*, p.real_name AS creatorName, a.real_name AS assigneeName FROM demand d LEFT JOIN sys_user p ON d.creator_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user a ON d.assignee_id = a.id WHERE d.project_id = #{projectId} AND d.delete_time IS NULL ORDER BY d.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalDemands, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedDemands, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('IN_DEVELOPMENT', 'IN_TEST') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inProgressDemands, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingDemands, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) ELSE 0 END as completionRate, AVG(CASE WHEN complete_time IS NOT NULL AND start_develop_time IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(complete_time, start_develop_time) ELSE NULL END) as avgDevelopmentDays FROM demand WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND delete_time IS NULL
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM demand WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND delete_time IS NULL GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM demand WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND delete_time IS NULL GROUP BY type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT i.id as iterationId, i.name as iterationName, i.start_time as startDate, i.end_time as endDate, COUNT(d.id) as totalDemands, SUM(CASE WHEN d.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN d.status IN ('IN_DEVELOPMENT', 'IN_TEST') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inProgressCount, SUM(CASE WHEN d.status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(d.id) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN d.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(d.id), 2) ELSE 0 END as progressPercent FROM sys_iteration i LEFT JOIN demand d ON i.id = d.iteration_id AND d.delete_time IS NULL WHERE i.id = #{iterationId} GROUP BY i.id, i.name, i.start_time, i.end_time
SELECT d.status, COUNT(*) as count FROM demand d WHERE d.iteration_id = #{iterationId} AND d.delete_time IS NULL GROUP BY d.status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT COALESCE(u.real_name, '未分配') as assigneeName, COUNT(*) as count FROM demand d LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON d.assignee_id = u.id WHERE d.iteration_id = #{iterationId} AND d.delete_time IS NULL GROUP BY u.real_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT DATE(d.complete_time) as date, COUNT(*) as dailyCompleted FROM demand d WHERE d.iteration_id = #{iterationId} AND d.delete_time IS NULL AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND d.complete_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE(d.complete_time) ORDER BY date ASC
